mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name as category_name, c.description as category_description, CASE WHEN c.level = 1 THEN c.name WHEN c.level = 2 THEN CONCAT(p1.name, '-', c.name) WHEN c.level = 3 THEN CONCAT(p1.name, '-', p2.name, '-', c.name) END as category_full_path FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN category p2 ON c.parent_id = p2.id LEFT JOIN category p1 ON p2.parent_id = p1.id ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT p.*, c.name as category_name, c.description as category_description, CASE WHEN c.level = 1 THEN c.name WHEN c.level = 2 THEN CONCAT(p1.name, '-', c.name) WHEN c.level = 3 THEN CONCAT(p1.name, '-', p2.name, '-', c.name) END as category_full_path FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN category p2 ON c.parent_id = p2.id LEFT JOIN category p1 ON p2.parent_id = p1.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product ( name, category_id, description, price, stock_quantity, min_stock_level, supplier, status, stock_value, in_time, created_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stockQuantity}, #{minStockLevel}, #{supplier}, #{status}, #{stockValue}, #{inTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{quantity}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET stock_quantity = #{stock}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
